hard_fails.rule: em dash or en dash anywhere
hard_fails.evidence: Transcribed all slides + post copy: hyphens only ('on-site', 'gas-fired', '50-year', '640-acre', 'gas-line', 'term-limited', 'CO-OP', 'DATA-CENTER'); ranges use 'to' ('350 to 500', '1 to 3', '2023 TO 2025'); coordinate/footer separators are middots. No U+2013/U+2014.
None in any render, copy.json, or first-comment block. Only glyph marks are the Polaris star (vector art) and middots.

hard_fails.rule: factual claim without a claim-id resolving to a verified source
hard_fails.evidence: Every rendered figure traces to a verified claim: 500/<12 (c01/c02), $10B attributed (c10), 715/50-yr/26mi (c06-c08), 1-3GW & 30% per Northern Journal (c12/c13), 7.1M cu yd/640ac/350-500MMcf/12F/10%/1.8mi (c14-c18,c26,c27), verbatim quotes (c19-c23), 4,700ac/12 parcels/<1mi school (c30,c31,c37), vacuum quote (c38), Jun29/Jul13/Jul16/Jul17 (c34,c45,c46,c60,c03), Aug 18 primary (c78/c79).

hard_fails.rule: typo or misspelling in any rendered slide
hard_fails.evidence: Transcribed every headline, body, quote, label and footer across slides 1-9; no misspellings. Quoted spans match claims verbatim.

All primary type is snow #F4F8FF / light on deep-navy (~16:1). Muted mono is #8DA2BE on near-black, comfortably >4.5:1. Slide-3 bar labels sit outside bars on dark bg as designed.

criteria.name: Thumb-stop cover
criteria.notes: Slide 1 lands a specific named tension ('500 wrote in. Fewer than 12 said yes.') in huge Fraunces with the Alaska map + named towns; visibly Alaskan, no cliche. Held back from 9 by the deadline chip wedged between '12' and 'said yes.', which slightly interrupts the headline stack's focal flow.

criteria.name: Story arc & swipe momentum
criteria.notes: Clean HOOK-context-point-breather-point-widen-point-synthesis-close cadence; each slide plants the next loop explicitly; slide 2 pays the cover instantly; slide 6 is the genuine 'it's bigger' turn; slide 8 argues, 9 asks. Contact sheet reads as one composed sequence; nothing reorderable.

criteria.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
criteria.notes: Real range: masterful 3D bench on slide 4 (atmospheric perspective, single motivated flare, subtle volumetric shafts, cabinet-extruded pad) survives the zoom; strong cartographic glow maps, transit-timeline on 6, lit door glyphs on 8, honest bar system on 3. Docked for dead lower-half zones on slides 2, 3, and 9 where the composition thins out.

criteria.name: Story-art fusion
criteria.notes: Parameters visibly encode the numbers: bar lengths = GW ratio (1GW bar ~30% past urban peak, 3GW runs off-frame), timeline node y-position = date and size = public access, slide-5 type scale = 500-vs-12 imbalance, door states = access, map camera-state tracks the narrative.

criteria.name: Alaska authenticity & local relevance
criteria.notes: Named places throughout (Deadhorse, Nuiqsut, Kodiak, Kotzebue, Seward, Valdez, JBER, Eielson, Clear, North Pole Middle School), real orgs/people (STAK, GVEA, DNR, John Boyle), real docket ADL 422741, accurate geography. Would make an Alaskan feel seen, not marketed to.

criteria.name: Insight density & factual weight
criteria.notes: Every content slide adds a NEW verified specific (number, name, date, mechanism); bodies land ~26-33 words; zero filler; developer's side attributed ('per Stak', '10% or less', '12 F') for balance.

criteria.name: Variety vs ledger
criteria.notes: Ledgers empty (first deck), so no divergence to measure; scored on internal variety and dossier justification: nine distinct composition systems, dials (variance 3 / density 3 / temp 4) reasoned in the storyboard. Establishes the house baseline with confidence.

criteria.name: Legibility & platform fitness
criteria.notes: RECOVERED from the round-0 cap. Floors met, reads at 432px thumb, vector PDF 10.74MB with title, 'NN / 09' counters on every slide. The three overlap breaks are genuinely gone. One remaining squeaker: slide-9 gold 'DNR ADL 422741' sits tight to the right edge (rendered complete, not clipped).

criteria.name: Copy: voice & hook
criteria.notes: Hook lands in ~114 chars; 586 chars total; analytical position-taking; deck-summary line present; real debatable closing question; grade 8-10.

criteria.name: Deliverable completeness
criteria.notes: copy.json complete: post copy, exactly 3 hashtags, 6-source first-comment block, document title, aftercare checklist, claims_used. assemble_report confirms vector PDF, 9 thumbs, contact sheet, title. Held from 9 only because image/PDF URL resolution on main is downstream of this gate.
